description: A fluffy ginger cat sits on a plaid couch with its tongue peeking out, while a human hand reaches toward its front paw.
A cream-colored cat with a red collar lies on a geometric-patterned couch, staring intently at a person's moving hand while on-screen text reads 'That looks difficult!'
An orange cat lies on a patterned sofa with its paw resting on a coin while licking its nose.
A ginger cat rests on a patterned bedspread with its paw placed on a coin, looking down intently as on-screen text reads, 'I'm gonna give it a go!'
A fluffy ginger cat rests on a geometric-patterned bedspread with a silver coin balanced on its front paw, licking its lips as if guarding its treasure.
